Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Files: {r[\\"stats\\"][\\"files_processed\\"]}, Symbols: {r[\\"stats\\"][\\"symbols_matched\\"]}, Ratio: {r[\\"stats\\"][\\"compression_ratio\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  {f[\\"file_path\\"]}'\) for f in r['pruned_files']]")
